_meta.notes: Observed production / imports / exports / consumption / stocks per country per staple per marketing year. Latest marketing year per (country, commodity, attribute). Values in 1000 metric tonnes. Commodities: wheat, rice (milled), corn, soybeans. 151 countries covered; imports captured for 151, exports for 151. Source refreshes monthly on WASDE release day; cron pulls every 6h but upstream data rarely changes between WASDE windows.
